name: LessonConfidence
goal: Ask the learner to rate their confidence on a topic before or after an exercise (1=not confident, 5=very confident).
description: Metacognitive rating widget with 5 circular buttons. The label prop sets the prompt. Clicking a button sets rating, marks the card submitted (attribute reflects), disables all other buttons, and fires lesson-confidence-rate. reset() clears state. Supports Bjork's desirable-difficulty framework.

props.name: label
props.description: Prompt text shown above the rating buttons.

props.name: submitted
props.description: Auto-set to true when a rating is selected. Disables further interaction.

events.name: lesson-confidence-rate
events.description: Fires when the user picks a rating. detail.rating is 1–5.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Clears the rating and removes the submitted state.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Scale label and result font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Label, scale label, and muted text color.

sideEffects.description: Tracks selected rating and submitted state.
sideEffects.reason: Required to render selection and disable buttons after submission.
